summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Flowtym PMS - Backend APIs working well, critical frontend login issue identified

minor_bugs.issue: Returns status 200 instead of 201 for successful registration
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - functionality works but incorrect HTTP status code

minor_bugs.issue: Returns status 200 instead of 201 for successful client creation
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - functionality works but incorrect HTTP status code

minor_bugs.issue: Returns status 200 instead of 201 for successful audit creation
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - functionality works but incorrect HTTP status code

data_conflicts.issue: Seeded data conflicts with test data creation
data_conflicts.details: User registration and room creation fail due to existing seeded data
data_conflicts.impact: Expected behavior - tests should handle existing data

critical_bugs.issue: Login form submission not working - stays on login page after successful API authentication
critical_bugs.details: Backend API returns valid token but frontend doesn't redirect to main app

integration_issues.issue: Frontend login integration broken - API works but UI doesn't respond
integration_issues.details: Login API call succeeds but user remains on login screen

ui_bugs.issue: Cannot access PMS features due to login failure

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend login integration - Backend authentication API works perfectly but frontend login form doesn't redirect after successful authentication. User gets stuck on login page despite valid credentials. This blocks access to all PMS functionality.
